SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Crafting Landscapes, Building Relationships

Lakewood Landscaping started with a simple mission: to bring exceptional landscaping services to Boise and the surrounding communities. Founded by a Boise native with a passion for the outdoors, we've grown from a small operation to a trusted name in landscape design and maintenance.

Our approach is rooted in collaboration and communication. We believe in understanding our clients' visions and translating them into stunning, functional landscapes. From initial consultation to project completion, we prioritize transparency and quality craftsmanship.

We're committed to giving back to the community that has supported us. Lakewood Landscaping actively participates in local initiatives and strives to use sustainable practices in all our projects, helping to preserve the natural beauty of the Boise area for future generations.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Lakewood Landscaping llc

Local Expertise

Deep understanding of Boise's climate, soil, and plant life ensures thriving landscapes.

Custom Designs

Tailored landscape plans that reflect your unique style and enhance your property's value.

Reliable Service

Punctual, professional, and committed to exceeding your expectations on every project.

Sustainable Practices

Eco-friendly landscaping solutions that minimize environmental impact and promote long-term health.

Ready to Transform Your Outdoor Space?

Contact Lakewood Landscaping today for a free consultation and estimate.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Lakewood Landscaping transformed our backyard into an oasis! Their design team listened to our ideas and created a plan that exceeded our expectations. The crew was professional and efficient, and the finished product is stunning. We highly recommend them!

Sarah M. Landscape Design
“

We've been using Lakewood Landscaping for lawn care for the past year, and our lawn has never looked better. They're reliable, professional, and always do a great job. The weed control is especially effective.

John B. Lawn Care & Maintenance
“

Our sprinkler system broke down in the middle of summer, and Lakewood Landscaping came to the rescue. They quickly diagnosed the problem and repaired it at a fair price. We were impressed with their prompt and efficient service.

Emily K. Irrigation System Repair
“

Lakewood Landscaping built a beautiful patio for us. The quality of the workmanship is outstanding, and the crew was a pleasure to work with. We're thrilled with our new outdoor living space.

David L. Hardscaping (Patio Installation)
“

Lakewood Landscaping did a fantastic job with our spring cleanup. They removed all the debris and prepared our landscape for the growing season. It was so nice to have everything taken care of.

Jessica P. Spring Cleanup
“

The outdoor lighting Lakewood Landscaping installed has dramatically improved our property's curb appeal and security. The team helped us choose the perfect fixtures, and the installation was seamless. Highly recommend!

Tom S. Outdoor Lighting

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does landscape design cost?
The cost of landscape design varies depending on the scope of the project. We offer free consultations to provide you with a detailed estimate.
What is included in a landscape design plan?
Our landscape design plans include detailed drawings, plant lists, material specifications, and construction instructions.
How long does the design process take?
The design process typically takes 2-4 weeks, depending on the complexity of the project.
